title: strLength assertion on join and concat
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (name VARCHAR(100), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE b (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO a (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), (NULL, 25);
SELECT a.name, CONCAT('{ "user":"', a.name, '", "age":', COALESCE(CAST(a.age AS CHAR), 'NULL'), ' }') as json FROM a JOIN b ON a.age = b.id;
key_bug_features: strLength assertion on join and concat
